description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-date-picker` (T2-32). 3/6 libraries — healthcare-critical (appointments, DOB, prescriptions). NOTE: PR #175 required.

Review `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-date-picker/`.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, ISO date string typing, min/max date constraints, form value typing
2. Accessibility — calendar grid pattern: `role="grid"`, date cells `role="gridcell"`, `aria-selected`, `aria-current="date"` for today, keyboard (arrows navigate days, PageUp/Down months, Home/End week, Enter selects, Escape closes), dialog pattern for popup calendar, axe-core pass
3. Tests — date selection, min/max constraints, keyboard nav through calendar, form association, date format display
4. Storybook — date picker, date range, min/max constraints, different locales
5. CSS — calendar layout, selected/today/disabled dates, `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle size scrutiny (date pickers are heavy), < 5KB target
7. Drupal — form-associated, ISO date value, Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-date-picker/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-date-picker — T2-32 antagonistic quality review
